summary.en: AI agents that handle day-to-day operations for corporate finance teams.
summary.zh: 為企業財務團隊處理日常營運工作的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Concourse offers an AI analyst built for finance teams, available around the clock via natural language and connected to a company's existing financial systems.
highlight.zh: Concourse 提供專為財務團隊打造的 AI 分析師,全天候透過自然語言使用,並與公司既有財務系統連接。

summary.en: A universal API that connects companies to warehouse management systems.
summary.zh: 將企業連接至倉儲管理系統的通用 API。

highlight.en: Branded as the Plaid for supply chain logistics, Trackstar lets companies integrate with hundreds of warehouse management systems in minutes rather than months.
highlight.zh: Trackstar 定位為供應鏈物流界的 Plaid,讓企業在數分鐘而非數月內整合上百個倉儲管理系統。

summary.en: An AI platform for clinical decision support and ambient scribing.
summary.zh: 用於臨床決策支援與環境語音記錄的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Glass Health gives clinicians AI tools to develop differential diagnoses and draft clinical plans.
highlight.zh: Glass Health 為臨床醫師提供 AI 工具,協助制定鑑別診斷並草擬臨床治療計畫。

summary.en: Models and infrastructure for deploying production-ready coding agents.
summary.zh: 用於部署正式環境程式編寫代理的模型與基礎設施。

highlight.en: Relace co-optimizes its models with infrastructure to reach 10k+ tokens/s code merging and retrieval across million-line repositories in seconds.
highlight.zh: Relace 將模型與基礎設施共同最佳化,可在數秒內以每秒逾一萬 token 的速度於百萬行程式碼庫中完成程式合併與檢索。

summary.en: An open-source platform for usage metering and AI and API monetization.
summary.zh: 用於用量計量與 AI 及 API 變現的開源平台。

highlight.en: OpenMeter processes billions of events into a usage lake within seconds, serving as the backbone for revenue and efficiency teams.
highlight.zh: OpenMeter 可在數秒內將數十億筆事件處理進用量資料湖,作為營收與效率團隊的核心後盾。

summary.en: A compliant crypto on- and off-ramp for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲提供的合規加密貨幣出入金通道。

highlight.en: Koywe offers documented, compliant payments APIs so any company can use crypto to power remittances, USD wallets, and investments.
highlight.zh: Koywe 提供文件完整且合規的支付 API,讓任何公司都能運用加密貨幣支援匯款、美元錢包與投資服務。

summary.en: A low-code API and workflow builder with an integrated Postgres database.
summary.zh: 內建 Postgres 資料庫的低程式碼 API 與工作流程建構工具。

highlight.en: Billed as Webflow for the backend, Fastgen's drag-and-drop platform lets teams rapidly build custom APIs and workflows with built-in data storage.
highlight.zh: Fastgen 定位為後端版的 Webflow,其拖放式平台讓團隊快速建構自訂 API 與工作流程,並內建資料儲存。

summary.en: A platform helping birth and postpartum doulas accept health insurance.
summary.zh: 協助生產與產後陪產員接受健康保險的平台。

highlight.en: Starting in California, Loula handles credentialing, contracting, and revenue cycle management so independent doulas can bill insurance and focus on care.
highlight.zh: Loula 自加州起步,代為處理資格認證、合約與營收循環管理,讓獨立陪產員能向保險請款並專注於照護。

summary.en: Tools that help families understand and reduce their screen time.
summary.zh: 協助家庭了解並減少螢幕使用時間的工具。

highlight.en: Clearspace gives families their time back with tools to understand and control how their time is spent online.
highlight.zh: Clearspace 透過協助家庭了解並掌控線上時間花費的工具,為他們找回時間。

summary.en: Project management and billing software for infrastructure construction.
summary.zh: 用於基礎設施建設的專案管理與計費軟體。

highlight.en: Clad unifies project operations and finance to automate tracking, payments, and permitting for contractors and utilities rebuilding internet and power grids.
highlight.zh: Clad 整合專案營運與財務,為重建網路與電力網路的承包商與公用事業自動化追蹤、付款與許可作業。

summary.en: A single API helping global software companies meet local tax reporting rules.
summary.zh: 協助全球軟體公司符合各地稅務申報規定的單一 API。

highlight.en: Invopop lets companies like SumUp, Fever, and DeepL handle electronic invoicing and real-time tax reporting across 25+ countries through one integration.
highlight.zh: Invopop 讓 SumUp、Fever 與 DeepL 等公司透過單一整合,在 25 個以上國家處理電子發票與即時稅務申報。

summary.en: An AI decision platform for investment firms.
summary.zh: 為投資公司打造的 AI 決策平台。

highlight.en: Investment firms use Benchmark to screen deals, extract insights from unstructured data, and automate workflows across the deal lifecycle.
highlight.zh: 投資公司運用 Benchmark 篩選交易、從非結構化資料中萃取洞察,並在整個交易週期中自動化工作流程。

summary.en: A biotech developing off-the-shelf cancer vaccines.
summary.zh: 開發現成型癌症疫苗的生技公司。

highlight.en: Adventris targets poorly immunogenic oncogenes; its first vaccine aims at KRAS, the most common cancer oncogene, with a long-term vision of pan-cancer vaccines.
highlight.zh: Adventris 鎖定免疫原性低的致癌基因,首支疫苗針對最常見的致癌基因 KRAS,並以泛癌症疫苗為長遠願景。

summary.en: A platform that makes running services on Kubernetes as easy as Heroku.
summary.zh: 讓在 Kubernetes 上運行服務如同 Heroku 般簡單的平台。

highlight.en: Skyhook delivers an out-of-the-box internal developer platform on your own cloud, giving companies Kubernetes' power without dedicated infrastructure engineers.
highlight.zh: Skyhook 在你自有的雲端上提供開箱即用的內部開發者平台,讓企業無需聘僱專職基礎設施工程師也能運用 Kubernetes 的能力。

summary.en: An AI teammate platform that automates painful GTM workflows.
summary.zh: 自動化棘手市場進入工作流程的 AI 隊友平台。

highlight.en: Unify starts with one painful workflow, gives an AI teammate the context, and builds a shared operating layer that compounds from there.
highlight.zh: Unify 從一個棘手的工作流程開始,為 AI 隊友提供脈絡,並建立可不斷累積成長的共享運作層。

summary.en: Frictionless SMS-based payments and marketing for e-commerce brands.
summary.zh: 為電商品牌提供無摩擦的簡訊支付與行銷。

highlight.en: OneText lets shoppers reply and buy with a single text, making each purchase as effortless as charging to a hotel room number.
highlight.zh: OneText 讓消費者只需回覆一則簡訊即可購買,使每筆交易如同掛帳到飯店房號般輕鬆。

summary.en: A single API for building all of your product's integrations.
summary.zh: 用於建構產品所有整合的單一 API。

highlight.en: Nango lets SaaS teams ship integrations fast using hundreds of pre-built connectors plus unlimited customization.
highlight.zh: Nango 讓 SaaS 團隊運用數百個預建連接器與無限自訂功能,快速推出整合。

summary.en: An AI platform helping engineering labs develop physical products faster.
summary.zh: 協助工程實驗室更快開發實體產品的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Ohm supports enterprises in batteries, automotive, and consumer electronics to launch hardware faster and cut the cost of engineering test programs.
highlight.zh: Ohm 協助電池、汽車與消費性電子領域的企業更快推出硬體產品,並降低工程測試計畫的成本。

summary.en: Workflow software for solar and energy contractors.
summary.zh: 為太陽能與能源承包商打造的工作流程軟體。

highlight.en: Coperniq replaces Salesforce and spreadsheets with an industry-specific platform that cuts soft cost per install by $3K and speeds completion by 45 days.
highlight.zh: Coperniq 以產業專屬平台取代 Salesforce 與試算表,每次安裝可節省 3,000 美元軟成本,並將專案完工提前 45 天。

summary.en: Predictive AI that forecasts video virality for social media strategy.
summary.zh: 預測影片爆紅程度以輔助社群媒體策略的 AI。

highlight.en: CreatorML built a foundation model for human attention, helping businesses scale their social media strategy by predicting video virality.
highlight.zh: CreatorML 建立了人類注意力的基礎模型,透過預測影片爆紅程度協助企業擴展社群媒體策略。

summary.en: Signal-based automation for outbound sales targeting.
summary.zh: 以訊號為基礎的對外銷售目標鎖定自動化工具。

highlight.en: Bluebirds builds custom intent signals from trusted data, scanning the market and delivering ready-to-prospect leads to a team's CRM to save reps hours daily.
highlight.zh: Bluebirds 從可信資料建立自訂意圖訊號,掃描市場並將可立即開發的潛在客戶送入團隊 CRM,每日為業務省下數小時。

summary.en: A unified API for commercial real estate software integrations.
summary.zh: 用於商業房地產軟體整合的統一 API。

highlight.en: Branded as Plaid for commercial real estate, Propexo lets engineers build, test, and launch CRE integrations in days with clear docs and robust infrastructure.
highlight.zh: Propexo 定位為商業房地產界的 Plaid,讓工程師憑藉清晰文件與穩健基礎設施在數天內建構、測試並上線 CRE 整合。

summary.en: A real-time speech translator that preserves the speaker's voice and emotion.
summary.zh: 保留說話者聲音與情感的即時語音翻譯器。

highlight.en: EzDubs translates speech without waiting for full sentences, clones voices with no enrollment, and replicates emotions across calls, voice messages, and texts.
highlight.zh: EzDubs 無需等待完整句子即可翻譯語音,免註冊複製聲音,並在即時通話、語音訊息與文字中重現情感。

summary.en: A financial copilot that answers questions over financial documents for investors.
summary.zh: 為投資人解讀財務文件並回答問題的金融副駕駛。

highlight.en: Fintool acts as ChatGPT on top of financial documents, surfacing insights for institutional investors beyond the reach of human analysis or search tools.
highlight.zh: Fintool 如同建立在財務文件之上的 ChatGPT,為機構投資人挖掘人工分析或搜尋工具難以企及的洞察。

summary.en: A single source of truth for SQL queries inside your editor.
summary.zh: 在編輯器中作為 SQL 查詢單一真實來源的工具。

highlight.en: Sherloq's plugin sits on top of existing query editors so data teams can manage all their SQL in one place instead of scattered notepads, Slack, and docs.
highlight.zh: Sherloq 的外掛建構於既有查詢編輯器之上,讓資料團隊集中管理所有 SQL,免於散落在記事本、Slack 與文件中。

summary.en: A semantic layer that keeps shared data logic consistent for data teams.
summary.zh: 為資料團隊維持共享資料邏輯一致性的語意層。

highlight.en: Honeydew validates each change and updates every data flow automatically, letting data teams support 10x more users without more engineers or lost integrity.
highlight.zh: Honeydew 自動驗證每項變更並更新每條資料流,讓資料團隊在不增加工程師且不犧牲一致性下服務十倍以上的使用者。

summary.en: Autonomous high-altitude aircraft providing satellite-like services on demand.
summary.zh: 提供類衛星隨需服務的自主高空飛行器。

highlight.en: Radical's StratoSats fly within the atmosphere to deliver persistent earth observation and connectivity, navigating freely without rockets or orbits.
highlight.zh: Radical 的 StratoSats 在大氣層內飛行,提供持續性的地球觀測與連線服務,無需火箭或軌道即可自由導航。

summary.en: AI-driven automation that develops long-lasting drug formulations faster.
summary.zh: 以 AI 自動化加速開發長效藥物配方的公司。

highlight.en: Persist AI cuts development time for long-acting injections for chronic diseases like cancer and diabetes from about 5 years to 2, a roughly 50% reduction.
highlight.zh: Persist AI 將癌症、糖尿病等慢性病長效注射藥物的開發時間從約五年縮短至兩年,約減少 50%。

summary.en: An AI-powered pricing co-pilot for retail operators.
summary.zh: 為零售營運者打造的 AI 定價副駕駛。

highlight.en: Built by founders who developed pricing tech at Uber, Luca constantly identifies revenue and profit headroom and recommends price adjustments for retailers.
highlight.zh: Luca 由曾在 Uber 打造定價技術的創辦人開發,持續為零售商找出營收與利潤空間並提供調價建議。

summary.en: Scheduling software helping digital health clinics improve their margins.
summary.zh: 協助數位健康診所改善利潤的排程軟體。

highlight.en: Built by founders who ran their own clinic, Untether Labs brings the scheduling tech digital clinics need to fix margins back to other clinics.
highlight.zh: Untether Labs 由曾自行經營診所的創辦人打造,將數位診所改善利潤所需的排程技術帶給其他診所。

summary.en: A platform that turns DNA into synthetic protein-based drugs at scale.
summary.zh: 將 DNA 大規模轉化為合成蛋白質藥物的平台。

highlight.en: Invitris's platform makes new biological drugs over 10,000x more efficiently, led by synthetic bacteriophages that fight antibiotic-resistant infections.
highlight.zh: Invitris 曾登上《Science》的平台讓新生物藥物的製造效率提升逾一萬倍,主力應用為對抗抗藥性感染的合成噬菌體。

summary.en: An AI wealth manager for mass affluent households.
summary.zh: 為中高資產家庭打造的 AI 財富管理師。

highlight.en: Finvest is building Finn, an AI wealth manager that understands a user's full financial picture and helps them act across investing, cash, taxes, and debt.
highlight.zh: Finvest 正打造 AI 財富管理師 Finn,能掌握使用者的完整財務全貌,並協助其在投資、現金、稅務與債務間採取行動。

summary.en: A credit risk platform that predicts customer defaults for builders' merchants.
summary.zh: 為建材商預測客戶違約的信用風險平台。

highlight.en: Paperplane uses a merchant's own transaction data and sales-rep knowledge to predict which customers will default 4+ weeks before credit reports do.
highlight.zh: Paperplane 運用商家自身交易資料與業務的客戶認知,比信用報告提前四週以上預測哪些客戶會違約。

summary.en: AI automation for the entire document lifecycle: collect, review, extract, sync.
summary.zh: 涵蓋文件全生命週期的 AI 自動化:收集、審查、萃取與同步。

highlight.en: Pigeon collects documents from clients, extracts data with AI, and syncs to CRMs or storage, eliminating thousands of hours of manual back-and-forth.
highlight.zh: Pigeon 從客戶收集文件、以 AI 萃取資料並同步至 CRM 或儲存系統,省去數千小時的人工往返。

summary.en: A platform connecting doctors and patients to clinical trials via health records.
summary.zh: 透過健康紀錄將醫師與病患連接至臨床試驗的平台。

highlight.en: Novelcare analyzes health records to match patients with trials, tackling a gap where 72% of doctors want to inform patients of trials but only 5% do.
highlight.zh: Novelcare 分析電子健康紀錄為病患媒合試驗,填補 72% 醫師想告知病患臨床試驗、卻僅 5% 真正做到的落差。

summary.en: AI that speeds up customer data implementation and onboarding.
summary.zh: 加速客戶資料導入與上線的 AI 工具。

highlight.en: Lume helps teams analyze, map, and ingest customer data up to 87% faster, accelerating time-to-revenue.
highlight.zh: Lume 協助團隊以最高快 87% 的速度分析、對應並匯入客戶資料,加速實現營收。

summary.en: An AI platform that investigates and resolves engineering incidents.
summary.zh: 調查並解決工程事故的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Lynx automatically gathers information, pinpoints root causes, and executes solutions for incidents from data anomalies to production outages, cutting downtime.
highlight.zh: Lynx 自動蒐集資訊、找出根本原因並執行解決方案,處理從資料異常到正式環境中斷的各種事故,將停機時間降至最低。

summary.en: Account abstraction wallets as a service for app developers.
summary.zh: 為應用開發者提供的帳戶抽象錢包服務。

highlight.en: Acquired by Offchain Labs, ZeroDev lets developers create non-custodial wallets with gas-free transactions, bundling, and programmable security policies.
highlight.zh: ZeroDev 已被 Offchain Labs 收購,讓開發者建立支援免 Gas 交易、交易打包與可程式化安全政策的非託管錢包。

summary.en: Automated dependency update analysis to ship security fixes faster.
summary.zh: 自動化依賴更新分析,加速推送安全修補的工具。

highlight.en: Acquired by FOSSA in 2025, EdgeBit turns weeks of manual dependency review into minutes, helping teams ship security updates 10x faster.
highlight.zh: EdgeBit 於 2025 年被 FOSSA 收購,將數週的人工依賴審查縮短為數分鐘,協助團隊以十倍速度推送安全更新。

summary.en: AI agents that create self-healing end-to-end tests.
summary.zh: 建立自我修復端對端測試的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Narrative records user journeys to deploy tests in minutes, replacing Playwright, Selenium, and Cypress while agents handle flaky selectors and timing issues.
highlight.zh: Narrative 透過錄製使用者旅程在數分鐘內部署測試,取代 Playwright、Selenium 與 Cypress,並由代理處理不穩定的選擇器與時序問題。

summary.en: A conversational AI order taker for fast-food drive-thrus.
summary.zh: 為速食得來速打造的對話式 AI 點餐員。

highlight.en: OfOne automates drive-thru ordering with conversational AI that answers questions and intelligently upsells, targeting the 200,000 US drive-thrus.
highlight.zh: OfOne 以能回答問題並智慧加購的對話式 AI 自動化得來速點餐,鎖定全美 20 萬個得來速據點。

summary.en: An AI prototyping tool for product managers, founders, and designers.
summary.zh: 為產品經理、創辦人與設計師打造的 AI 原型製作工具。

highlight.en: Alloy captures your product from the browser instantly and builds lifelike, interactive AI prototypes that look exactly like the real thing.
highlight.zh: Alloy 可立即從瀏覽器擷取你的產品,並建構與實品外觀完全一致、栩栩如生的互動式 AI 原型。

summary.en: An AI creative engine turning a brand into a stream of on-brand video ads.
summary.zh: 將品牌轉化為一連串符合品牌調性影片廣告的 AI 創意引擎。

highlight.en: Goose indexes a brand's existing materials into a context layer and generates short-form Meta and TikTok creative that improves as the agent learns.
highlight.zh: Goose 將品牌既有素材編入脈絡層,生成 Meta 與 TikTok 短影音創意,並隨代理從成效學習而持續優化。

summary.en: An AI agent that coaches founders and invests in them.
summary.zh: 輔導創辦人並對其投資的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: No Cap bills itself as the world's first AI agent that coaches founders and invests in them, led by repeat AI founder Alexander Nevedovsky.
highlight.zh: No Cap 自稱是全球首個輔導創辦人並對其投資的 AI 代理,由連續 AI 創業者 Alexander Nevedovsky 帶領。

summary.en: An observability platform for developers building with large language models.
summary.zh: 為使用大型語言模型開發者打造的可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Helicone unifies performance, cost, and usage metrics across LLM providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and LangChain, with logging, tracing, and prompt management.
highlight.zh: Helicone 為 OpenAI、Anthropic、LangChain 等 LLM 供應商提供統一的效能、成本與用量檢視,並具備日誌、追蹤與提示詞管理功能。

summary.en: Multimodal AI agents that play and test video games.
summary.zh: 能遊玩並測試電玩遊戲的多模態 AI 代理。

highlight.en: nunu.ai infuses multimodal agents into game development, spanning QA all the way to player simulation.
highlight.zh: nunu.ai 將多模態代理融入遊戲開發流程,涵蓋從品質保證到玩家模擬的各環節。

summary.en: An AI-native tax platform offering proactive, year-round strategic guidance.
summary.zh: 提供主動式全年策略指引的 AI 原生稅務平台。

highlight.en: Rally pairs a platform that automates 80% of manual tax work with in-house experts to deliver private-advisor strategy for Americans with complex finances.
highlight.zh: Rally 結合可自動化 80% 人工稅務作業的平台與內部專家,為財務複雜的美國人提供私人顧問級的策略。

summary.en: AI-powered game translation delivered as SaaS.
summary.zh: 以 SaaS 形式提供的 AI 遊戲翻譯。

highlight.en: MagnaPlay combines AI, expert translators, and SaaS to translate games 5x faster at half the price, cutting out freelancer sourcing and negotiation.
highlight.zh: MagnaPlay 結合 AI、專業譯者與 SaaS,以五倍速度、半價完成遊戲翻譯,省去尋找自由譯者與議價的過程。

summary.en: An open-source AIOps platform that consolidates alerts from any monitoring tool.
summary.zh: 整合各監控工具警示的開源 AIOps 平台。

highlight.en: Keep acts as a single pane of glass for alerts, turning thousands into just tens of meaningful ones; it joined forces with Elastic in May 2025.
highlight.zh: Keep 作為警示的單一檢視介面,將數千則警示精簡為數十則有意義的警示,並於 2025 年 5 月與 Elastic 合作。

summary.en: An open-source, self-hostable alternative to Durable Objects.
summary.zh: 可自架的開源 Durable Objects 替代方案。

highlight.en: Rivet lets developers easily build and scale AI agents, functions, and stateful services, fully open-source and self-hostable.
highlight.zh: Rivet 讓開發者輕鬆建構並擴展 AI 代理、函式與有狀態服務,完全開源且可自行架設。

summary.en: Software to draft, review, and send complex regulatory notices instantly.
summary.zh: 即時草擬、審查並寄送複雜法規通知的軟體。

highlight.en: Insurers like Branch upload claim details to Kyber to auto-generate notice drafts, assign reviewers, and send letters with more consistency and compliance.
highlight.zh: Branch Insurance 等公司將理賠細節上傳至 Kyber,自動產生通知草稿、指派審查者並寄出信件,提升一致性與合規性。

summary.en: An all-in-one platform unifying how the optical industry does business.
summary.zh: 統一光學產業營運方式的一站式平台。

highlight.en: SpecCheck provides accurate prescription eyewear ordering and tracking, billing, and communication between patients, eye doctors, and lab partners.
highlight.zh: SpecCheck 提供精準的處方眼鏡訂購與追蹤、計費,以及病患、眼科醫師與實驗室夥伴間的溝通。

summary.en: Generative AI-designed enzymes for pharmaceutical innovation.
summary.zh: 為製藥創新設計的生成式 AI 酵素。

highlight.en: Pando's ultra-high-throughput platform screens 1000-fold more enzymes 75% faster and 80% cheaper, so its generative AI can optimize them across many properties.
highlight.zh: Pando 的超高通量平台篩選酵素數量多上千倍、速度快 75%、成本低 80%,讓其生成式 AI 能跨多項特性最佳化酵素。

summary.en: End-to-end AI automation for commercial insurance brokerages.
summary.zh: 為商業保險經紀商打造的端對端 AI 自動化工具。

highlight.en: Mulligan automates quoting, policy checking, proposals, and more by up to 90% for commercial insurance brokers.
highlight.zh: Mulligan 為商業保險經紀商自動化報價、保單檢核、提案等流程,最高可達 90%。

summary.en: Conversational data analytics that lets every team query data in plain language.
summary.zh: 讓每個團隊以自然語言查詢資料的對話式資料分析工具。

highlight.en: Brewit helps companies build role-specific BI agents on a semantic layer over their database that answer questions, write SQL, and plot charts conversationally.
highlight.zh: Brewit 協助企業建立以其資料庫訓練、透過語意層運作的角色專屬 BI 代理,以對話方式回答資料問題、撰寫 SQL 並產生圖表。

summary.en: A natively programmable spreadsheet with a full Python environment.
summary.zh: 內建完整 Python 環境的原生可程式化試算表。

highlight.en: Neptyne is a spreadsheet with a built-in Jupyter-like Python environment and AI, turning anyone who can use Excel into a programmer.
highlight.zh: Neptyne 是內建類 Jupyter Python 環境與 AI 的試算表,讓任何會用 Excel 的人都能成為程式設計師。

summary.en: A rent verification API for landlords and lenders.
summary.zh: 為房東與放款方提供的租金驗證 API。

highlight.en: As a Consumer Reporting Agency, Trigo aggregates consumer rent history into a real-time API, in a market where the largest database covers only 3% of rent data.
highlight.zh: 身為消費者徵信機構,Trigo 將消費者租金紀錄彙整為即時 API,填補最大資料庫僅涵蓋 3% 租金資料的市場缺口。

summary.en: Done-for-you employee security that blocks phishing and data leaks.
summary.zh: 全代管的員工資安方案,阻擋釣魚與資料外洩。

highlight.en: Built by security leaders from SpaceX, AWS, and Google, Repacket installs in 60 seconds to instantly block phishing and sensitive data leaks at small companies.
highlight.zh: Repacket 由 SpaceX、AWS 與 Google 的資安領袖打造,60 秒即可安裝,為中小企業即時阻擋釣魚與敏感資料外洩。

summary.en: An in-app AI assistant that guides and onboards software users.
summary.zh: 在應用內引導並協助軟體使用者上手的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Frigade's agent learns your product's interface to give contextual guidance that adapts to each user and takes actions directly on their behalf.
highlight.zh: Frigade 的代理學習你的產品介面,提供因人而異的情境指引,並可直接代使用者執行操作。

summary.en: Dataset management for AI trainers building generative models.
summary.zh: 為訓練生成式模型的 AI 訓練者提供資料集管理。

highlight.en: DataSuite lets non-technical builders collect and manage multi-terabyte multimedia datasets and train generative models without handling formats or storage.
highlight.zh: DataSuite 讓非技術背景的建構者收集並管理數 TB 的多媒體資料集並訓練生成式模型,無需煩惱格式或資料位置。

summary.en: An interface for viewing, editing, and visualizing your database.
summary.zh: 用於檢視、編輯與視覺化資料庫的介面。

highlight.en: Outerbase lets companies view, edit, and modify their data and build visual dashboards without writing a single line of SQL.
highlight.zh: Outerbase 讓企業無需撰寫任何一行 SQL,即可檢視、編輯與修改資料並建構視覺化儀表板。

summary.en: An AI-powered EHR for independent mental health professionals.
summary.zh: 為獨立心理健康專業人員打造的 AI 電子病歷系統。

highlight.en: Orchid integrates admin workflows, streamlines clinical processes, and automates manual flows to save independent mental health clinicians time and money.
highlight.zh: Orchid 整合行政工作流程、簡化臨床流程並自動化人工作業,為獨立心理健康業者省下時間、金錢與煩惱。

summary.en: A digital platform simplifying insurance for large real estate investors.
summary.zh: 為大型房地產投資人簡化保險的數位平台。

highlight.en: Homeflow gives larger real estate investors a single place to purchase and manage portfolio insurance, replacing policies spread across multiple brokers.
highlight.zh: Homeflow 讓大型房地產投資人在單一平台採購並管理整個投資組合的保險,取代分散於多家經紀商的保單。

summary.en: AI that auto-maintains your knowledge base from support channels and release notes.
summary.zh: 從支援管道與版本說明自動維護知識庫的 AI。

highlight.en: Ariglad integrates with support channels and release notes to suggest new articles, update existing ones, and detect and merge duplicates automatically.
highlight.zh: Ariglad 整合支援管道與版本說明,自動建議新文章、更新既有內容,並偵測與合併重複項目。

summary.en: A platform to build and host internal tools.
summary.zh: 用於建構與託管內部工具的平台。

highlight.en: David lets teams build and host their internal tools in one place.
highlight.zh: David 讓團隊在單一平台上建構與託管內部工具。

summary.en: A subscription app for reading romance comics.
summary.zh: 閱讀愛情漫畫的訂閱制應用程式。

highlight.en: Built by a team of women, Shortbread is Netflix for romance comics, working with top Kindle and BookTok authors to turn viral romance tropes into comics.
highlight.zh: Shortbread 由女性團隊打造,定位為愛情漫畫界的 Netflix,與 Kindle 及 BookTok 暢銷作家合作,將爆紅愛情題材改編為可免費閱讀的漫畫。

summary.en: An AI agent that helps fraud teams catch organized fraud earlier.
summary.zh: 協助詐欺防制團隊更早察覺有組織詐欺的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Finic analyzes structured and unstructured data across a company's systems to proactively surface organized fraud that rules and scoring models miss.
highlight.zh: Finic 分析企業各系統中的結構化與非結構化資料,主動揪出規則與評分模型遺漏的有組織詐欺。

summary.en: A platform that brings online ordering and services to European pharmacies.
summary.zh: 為歐洲藥局帶來線上訂購與服務的平台。

highlight.en: Billed as Shopify for pharmacies, Sanvivo lets local European pharmacies take and fill online orders and e-prescriptions, plus demand from delivery apps.
highlight.zh: Sanvivo 定位為藥局界的 Shopify,讓歐洲在地藥局能接收與處理線上訂單與電子處方,並透過第三方配送整合帶來需求。

summary.en: Emission-free hydrogen-electric aircraft for regional flights.
summary.zh: 用於區域航線的零排放氫電飛機。

highlight.en: Stralis's planes fly 10x further than battery-electric rivals at lower cost than fossil fuel; its 15-seat, 800km aircraft enters service in 2026 with Skytrans.
highlight.zh: Stralis 的飛機航程比電池電動替代方案遠十倍,且營運成本低於燃油機;其 15 人座、800 公里航程機型將於 2026 年隨 Skytrans 投入服務。

summary.en: Open-source embedded product integrations shipped in hours.
summary.zh: 可在數小時內上線的開源嵌入式產品整合。

highlight.en: OpenInt helps teams ship product integrations in hours using no- or low-code, reading and writing data via unified APIs or syncing straight to a database.
highlight.zh: OpenInt 讓團隊以無程式碼或低程式碼方式在數小時內上線產品整合,透過統一 API 讀寫資料或直接同步至資料庫。

summary.en: Product and infrastructure for real-time generative AI.
summary.zh: 用於即時生成式 AI 的產品與基礎設施。

highlight.en: Decohere lets customers iterate toward their creative vision in real time, without waiting for long-running GPU jobs.
highlight.zh: Decohere 讓客戶即時朝創意願景反覆迭代,無需等待耗時的 GPU 運算作業。

summary.en: An API for compliantly launching credit products.
summary.zh: 用於合規推出信貸產品的 API。

highlight.en: Branded as Stripe for credit, Pier handles origination, underwriting, and loan management in a few lines of code, with built-in compliance and licensing help.
highlight.zh: Pier 定位為信貸界的 Stripe,以幾行程式碼處理放款、核保與貸款管理,並內建合規防護與牌照支援。

summary.en: A platform of synthetic genes for cell and gene therapy.
summary.zh: 為細胞與基因治療打造的合成基因平台。

highlight.en: Modulari-T designs synthetic genes that reprogram cells to sense their environment, engineering immune cells to kill cancer or stem cells to regenerate tissue.
highlight.zh: Modulari-T 設計可重新編程細胞以感知環境的合成基因,將免疫細胞改造為攻擊癌細胞,或讓幹細胞再生組織。

summary.en: An AI-native document editor for long-form writing.
summary.zh: 為長篇寫作打造的 AI 原生文件編輯器。

highlight.en: Type.ai is built for long-form storytelling, helping people craft books, novels, essays, and screenplays.
highlight.zh: Type.ai 專為長篇敘事打造,協助人們創作書籍、小說、散文與劇本。

summary.en: All-in-one software for the $1 trillion grocery industry.
summary.zh: 為一兆美元雜貨產業打造的一站式軟體。

highlight.en: Vendora modernizes grocery with point of sale, payments, e-commerce, inventory, loyalty, and analytics, built by operators from Amazon, Uber, Tesla, and Figma.
highlight.zh: Vendora 以 POS、支付、電商、庫存、會員與分析功能革新雜貨業,團隊來自 Amazon、Uber、Tesla 與 Figma。

summary.en: A personalized shopping app that buys clothes tailored to you.
summary.zh: 為你量身採購服飾的個人化購物應用程式。

highlight.en: Fetchr is the first personalized shopping app for clothes, buying garments uniquely tailored to each user without any work on their part.
highlight.zh: Fetchr 是首款個人化服飾購物應用,為每位使用者量身採購服飾,且完全無需使用者費心。

summary.en: An AI-powered personal assistant for homeowners' home projects.
summary.zh: 為屋主居家專案打造的 AI 個人助理。

highlight.en: Instead of sifting reviews and playing phone tag, homeowners text Upfront to be connected with a curated set of local home service professionals.
highlight.zh: 屋主無需翻找評論或來回打電話,只要傳訊息給 Upfront,即可媒合精選的在地居家服務專業人員。

summary.en: AI simulations of drug molecules to guide pharmaceutical formulation.
summary.zh: 以 AI 模擬藥物分子以指引製藥配方的公司。

highlight.en: Lavo runs molecular simulations that pharma companies use to guide experiments, saving lab time and money to de-risk and speed clinical trials and FDA approval.
highlight.zh: Lavo 進行分子模擬供製藥公司指引實驗,節省實驗室時間與成本,以降低臨床試驗與 FDA 核准的風險並加速進程。

summary.en: AI workers that automate warranty workflows in home and auto markets.
summary.zh: 自動化居家與汽車市場保固工作流程的 AI 工作者。

highlight.en: Zudo.work deploys AI agents across voice and internal systems to handle high-volume warranty work like claims processing, coverage inquiries, and authorization.
highlight.zh: Zudo.work 在語音與內部系統間部署 AI 代理,處理理賠、保障查詢與授權等大量保固營運作業。

summary.en: A creative agency producing high-quality video advertisements.
summary.zh: 製作高品質影片廣告的創意代理商。

highlight.en: Built by a team of Hollywood creatives, Rubbrband brings film-grade production to fast-growing brands.
highlight.zh: Rubbrband 由好萊塢創意團隊打造,為快速成長的品牌帶來電影級的製作水準。

summary.en: An interface design tool that produces code-ready designs instantly.
summary.zh: 可即時產出可直接化為程式碼設計的介面設計工具。

highlight.en: Designbase lets early teams create stunning interfaces that are immediately available as code, regardless of resources.
highlight.zh: Designbase 讓早期團隊不論資源多寡,都能打造可立即化為程式碼的精美介面。

summary.en: An AI product backlog that prioritizes features by customer value.
summary.zh: 依客戶價值排序功能的 AI 產品待辦清單。

highlight.en: Cardinal pulls in customer feedback, CRM data, and task issues, then uses AI to assess which customers want which features, how important, and their value.
highlight.zh: Cardinal 匯入客戶回饋、CRM 資料與任務議題,再以 AI 評估哪些客戶想要哪些功能、其重要性與價值。

summary.en: A platform for multilingual AI voice agents handling phone-based tasks.
summary.zh: 為電話任務提供多語 AI 語音代理的平台。

highlight.en: Struct's multilingual AI voice agents handle any phone-based task, already running tens of thousands of calls daily across the globe in multiple languages.
highlight.zh: Struct 的多語 AI 語音代理可處理任何電話任務,目前已每日在全球以多種語言進行數萬通通話。

summary.en: In-product user guidance delivered through a unique second cursor.
summary.zh: 透過獨特第二游標提供的產品內使用者指引。

highlight.en: Layup's second cursor integrates into your UI to deliver real-time, adaptive assistance, saving product and support teams hours spent on in-app guides and docs.
highlight.zh: Layup 的第二游標整合進你的介面,提供即時且自適應的協助,為產品與支援團隊省下製作應用內指南與文件的時間。

summary.en: An AI-first user research platform for faster customer decisions.
summary.zh: 用於加速客戶決策的 AI 優先使用者研究平台。

highlight.en: Versive runs AI-moderated studies that deliver interview-quality results at survey speed, then uses AI analysis to turn transcripts into shareable insights.
highlight.zh: Versive 以 AI 主持研究,在問卷速度下提供訪談品質的結果,再透過 AI 輔助分析將逐字稿轉化為可分享的洞察。

summary.en: A neobank with spend management for e-commerce businesses.
summary.zh: 為電商企業提供支出管理的新型數位銀行。

highlight.en: Ruby combines banking and commerce data to give e-commerce businesses a real-time, unified view of their financial health and money movement.
highlight.zh: Ruby 結合銀行與商務資料,為電商企業提供財務狀況與資金流動的即時統一檢視。

summary.en: AI-powered customer support automation for fast-growing companies.
summary.zh: 為快速成長企業打造的 AI 客服自動化工具。

highlight.en: OpenSight uses LLMs to provide accurate answers and action resolution paths, resolving over 70% of inbound customer inquiries.
highlight.zh: OpenSight 運用大型語言模型提供精準回答與行動解決路徑,可解決超過 70% 的來電客戶詢問。

summary.en: An AI agent for managing cloud infrastructure across AWS, GCP, and Azure.
summary.zh: 管理 AWS、GCP 與 Azure 雲端基礎設施的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Infra.new generates reliable cloud configuration with cost estimates and system diagrams, then optimizes everything with AI, free to try without signing up.
highlight.zh: Infra.new 產生可靠的雲端設定並附上成本估算與系統圖,再以 AI 進行全面最佳化,免註冊即可試用。

summary.en: An API for real-time access to verified tax records.
summary.zh: 用於即時存取已驗證稅務紀錄的 API。

highlight.en: Chart's Unified Tax Record API bridges directly to records from the IRS, state tax agencies, and platforms like TurboTax and H&R Block.
highlight.zh: Chart 的統一稅務紀錄 API 直接串接 IRS、各州稅務機關,以及 TurboTax 與 H&R Block 等平台的紀錄。

summary.en: Delinquency reduction and automation software for institutional landlords.
summary.zh: 為機構型房東打造的拖欠降低與自動化軟體。

highlight.en: Cobblestone builds software to help institutional landlords reduce delinquency, starting with fraud reduction.
highlight.zh: Cobblestone 開發軟體協助機構型房東降低租金拖欠,並從減少詐欺著手。
